reviews.name: 뉴****
reviews.content:
평소에 노즈워크를 많이 해주는데 너무 똑같은것만 할까봐 양배추 새로운걸로 사봤어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
생각보다 넣을곳도 많고 난이도가 있는 것 같아서 만족해요!!! 
바스락 소리랑 삑삑이 다 있너서 넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I usually do a lot of nose work with my pup, so I was worried we'd get bored doing the same thing, so I decided to try out the cabbage toy! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ It has more spots to hide treats than I expected and seems to have some difficulty level, so I'm really satisfied!!! The crinkly sounds and the squeaker inside are both there, which is amazing 🐶

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 평소에 노즈워크장난감 너무 좋아해서 양배추보고 귀여워서 구매했는데요! 바스락바스락 소리가 다른 장난감과 비교가 안될정도로 크고 그래서인지 오자마자 엄청 잘 가지고 놀았어요ㅎㅎㅎ 매일아침 양배추노즈워크 해주고 출근하는데 쏙쏙 잘먹고 안에 삑삑이공도 잘 가지고 놀아요 :)
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves nose work toys, and I bought this cabbage toy because it's so cute! The crinkly crinkly sound is incomparably louder than other toys, and because of that, my pup started playing with it so much as soon as we got it ㅎㅎㅎ I do the cabbage nose work every morning before work, and my dog just loves finding and eating the treats, and also loves playing with the squeaker ball inside :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크하기 좋게 생겨서 샀어요!! 저희강아지는 식탐이 별로 없어서 똑똑해서 할줄은 아는데 귀찮은 노즈워크는 그냥 안해버리더라구요ㅋㅋㅋ 바스락 소리도 엄청 많이 나고 안에있는 양배추 안에있는 공 엄청 좋아해요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it looked great for nose work!! My dog doesn't have much food motivation and is actually pretty smart, but you know, she just refuses to do the boring nose work ㅋㅋㅋ The crinkly sounds come out super loud, and she absolutely loves the ball inside the cabbage ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
평소에도 고기보다 양배추를 사랑하는 강아지 조카를 위해 선물로 보내주었어요^^ 
받은 첫날부터 좋아서 정신을 못차리고 가지고 놀더니 그대로 자려고 한다네요~~ 
잎사귀마다 바스락 소리도 잘나고 가운데 삑삑이공에 
노즈워크까지!! 
귀여운 디자인은 물론 기능까지 완벽한 장난감입니다^^
reviews.content_en: I sent this as a gift to my nephew's dog, who loves cabbage even more than meat ^^ Since the first day he got it, he's been so excited he can't focus on anything else and just keeps playing with it, then falls asleep with it ~~ Every leaf makes a nice crinkly sound, and with the squeaker ball in the middle and nose work too!! It's a toy that's perfect in every way - cute design and great functionality ^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 견생 8년차지만 좋아합니다 ! 너무 잘사줬어요 !! 집에 혼자 있는 시간은 많이 없지만 가끔 외출할 일 생기면 조금이라도 노즈워크 하고 놀고 있으라고 노즈워크 장난감으로 사주고 요것도 강쥐 취향이라 구매했더니 역시 취향저격 ㅎㅎㅎ 노즈워크 고수라 금방 찾아 먹긴해요 ~~!! 아가들이 좋아할듯한데 숨길 곳이 많아 잘게 잘라서 여기저기 이파리에 숨기고 공 밑에도 놓고 그러니 킁킁킁킁 소리가 아주 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 자다가도 뽀시락 소리 들리면 달려와요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 친구 강쥐도 선물해주려고 했는데 품절이네요 ㅠ^ㅠ
reviews.content_en: My dog has been doing nose work for 8 years now, but he still loves this! You did such a great job getting this!! He doesn't spend much time alone at home, but whenever I have to go out, I give him a nose work toy so he can play and stay busy, and since this matched his taste perfectly, I got it, and as expected - right on target ㅎㅎㅎ Since he's an expert at nose work, he finds and eats everything pretty quickly ~~ But there are so many places to hide things, so I cut up treats into small pieces and hide them between the leaves, under the ball, etc., and the sniffing sniffing sniffing sounds are just ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ He even comes running when he hears the crinkly sounds while sleeping ㅋㅋㅋㅋ I was going to send one to a friend's dog too, but it's out of stock now ㅠ^ㅠ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
강아지가 정말 좋아해요! 너무너무 귀엽습니다. 
바잇미 장난감은 하나도 실패한게 없는데 특히 농산물 시리즈 들은 너무 귀엽고 좋아하네요!! 너무 귀여워요
야채가게 양배추 강아지 입니다!
 🐶🥦🌽🍎🍌🍠
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it! It's so so cute. BITE ME toys have never let me down, and especially the farm series are so adorable and my dog loves them!! So cute~ He's my cabbage-loving veggie stand pup! 🐶🥦🌽🍎🍌🍠

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무너무너무너무 귀여워요>_<
공도 같이 있으니 두가지 방법으로 놀아줄 수 있어서 더 좋고 바스락 소리도 커서 강아지가 엄청 재미있어해요:)
노즈워크용 장난감으로 딱입니다!
reviews.content_en: It's seriously sooo cute >_< Having the ball included is even better because you can play in two different ways, and the crinkly sound is loud so my dog has so much fun with it :) Perfect as a nose work toy!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
귀여워요. 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요^^
노즈워크는 워낙 잘해서 그런지 금방 찾아서 먹고는 바로 팽하네요^^;; 난이도가 쉬워요ㅎㅎ
그래도 바스락 거리는 소리가 좋은지 물고 흔들고 이리저리 끌고 다니면서 혼자 잘 놀아서 뿌듯^^
reviews.content_en: It's cute. My dog loves playing with it ^^ Since he's so good at nose work, he finds and eats everything pretty quickly and then loses interest ^^;; The difficulty level is a bit easy ㅎㅎ Still, he seems to love the crinkly sound - he bites it, shakes it, drags it around, and plays with it on his own, which makes me so proud ^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
귀여워서 웃었네요.
양배춧잎 사이사이 간식숨겨주니
잘가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: It made me laugh because it's so cute. When I hide treats between the cabbage leaves, he plays with it really well.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리도 많이 나고 간식 숨길 공간이 무궁무진하네요~ 아주 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It makes lots of crinkly sounds and there are tons of spaces to hide treats~ I really love it

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
안그래도 예전부터 사주고싶었는뎅 마침 기존에 있던 장난감들 질려하는거같아서 개린이날 선물로 사줬는데 환장하고 너므 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 얘가 이런 인형류의 택이란 택은 다 물어뜯는
습성이 있는데 나름 튼튼해서 아직 버티고 있어요 ㅋㅋㅋ양배추 안이 공으로 분리되는것도 넘 귀엽고 전체가 바스락 소리가 나서 저도 만질멋 나더라구요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I'd been wanting to get this for a while, and since my pup seemed bored with the existing toys, I got it as a Puppy Day gift and she absolutely loves it lol She has this habit of chewing on every single plush toy tag, but this one's pretty durable so it's holding up well lol The ball inside the cabbage separates which is so cute, and the whole thing makes a crinkly sound that I enjoy touching too haha

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아는 동생이 먼저 구매하고는 좋다고.. 
아가도 너무 좋아한다고 해서 저도 구매한 양배추씨 2개

바잇미 미니바이츠 트레이닝 트릿-베지 6~7개를
1조각에 4등분해서 스무여개를 양배추 이파리
사이사이 넣어 주었더니 딸내미 둘 다 난리가 났어요 ㅋ

말티즈 3.3kg, 장모치와와 2.2kg..
둘 다 겁이 많아서 처음 보는 물건은 경계하느라
잘 안 가지고 노는데 간식을 넣아줄 수 있다보니
바로 노즈워크를 시작하더라구요

처음에는 자꾸 밀고 다녀서 둘 다 살짝 잡아주었고
아리는 간식을 다 먹은 후에도 계속 노즈워크 홀릭

바스락 매니아인 저희 아가들을 위한 인형 같고
작은 아이들이 노즈워크 하기에도 너무 좋네요!!

전 매우 만족 별 다섯개도 부족할만큼 너무 좋아유!!
reviews.content_en:
My younger friend bought this first and said it was great, so her pup loved it too, which is why I bought 2 cabbage ones as well

I broke up 6-7 of the BITE ME Mini Bites Training Treats - Veggie into quarters and stuffed about 20 pieces between the cabbage leaves, and both my girls went crazy lol

Maltese 3.3kg, long-haired Chihuahua 2.2kg..
Both are shy dogs so they're cautious with new things and don't usually play with them, but since I could hide treats inside, they started doing nose work right away!

At first they kept pushing it around so I had to help them both a bit, and Ari kept doing nose work even after finishing all the treats 🙂

It's like a plush toy for my little crinkle maniacs, and it's perfect for smaller dogs to do nose work with!!

I'm so satisfied, even 5 stars isn't enough, I absolutely love it!!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요..
가격때문에 망설였는데 사길 잘한거같아여!
강아지가 바스락+삑삑+노즈워크 쓰리콤보로 하루종일 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
양배추 잎 사이사이에 간식 넣어주면 쉬운 난이도로 아이들이 노즈워크하면서 놀 수 있고,
가운데 동그란 인형 안에 넣어주면 조금 더 어려운 난이도로 낑낑대면서 노즈워크 할 수 있어요! 
밤인데 잠도안자고 계속 바스락바스락 대면서 가지고 노네요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
고민하지말고 구매하셔요!
reviews.content_en:
It's so cute..
I hesitated because of the price, but I'm so glad I bought it!
My pup plays with it all day long with the three-combo of crinkle + squeak + nose work hehe
You can put treats between the cabbage leaves for an easy difficulty level for nose work play, and if you put them inside the round toy in the middle, it becomes a harder level where they can whine and work their nose! 
It's nighttime and he's not even sleeping, just keeps crunkling and playing with it hehe
Don't hesitate, just buy it!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
양배추 사이사이에 사료 넣어주면 잘 찾아먹어요 ㅎㅎ 급하게 먹는 강아지들에게 넣어주면 좋은것 같아여.
근데 양배추 사이사이는 노즈워크? 라고 하기에는 난이도가 너무 쉽고 그나마 안에 공처럼 되어있는곳에 넣어둬야 잘가지고 놀아요! 공은 누르면 삑삑 소리가 나는데 집에 딸랑 공을 너무 잘가지고 놀아서 공으로도 가지고 놀수있기 좋지 않을까 했는데! 저희 강아지는 공으로는? 그렇게 흥미롭진 않은것 같아 조금 아쉬웠어요 ㅎㅎ 그래도 바스락 소리를 워낙 좋이해서 본인만한 이 큰 양배추 인형을 물고 끌고다니네요^^
reviews.content_en:
When I put kibble between the cabbage leaves, my pup finds and eats it well hehe It seems good for dogs who eat too quickly.
But between the cabbage leaves is a bit too easy to call it nose work? It's better when I put treats inside the ball-like compartment in the middle. The ball squeaks when you press it, and since my pup loves the bell ball so much, I thought it would be good to play with it as a ball too! But for my dog, the ball doesn't seem that interesting? Which was a bit disappointing hehe Still, she loves the crinkly sound so much that she carries this big cabbage toy around biting it ^^

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
강아지 생일선물로 구매했어요!!
나풀대고 바스락 거리는 재질의 장난감을 정말 좋아해서
양배추잎 물고 흔들고 바스락 대니까 환장하네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
가운데 동그란 삑삑이 장난감도 입 크기에 딱 맞아서 엄청 좋아해요!!! 10kg 강아지한테 약간 큰 것 같기도 한데 손으로 잡고 놀아주기에도 좋고, 강아지 혼자 물고 놀기에도 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
I bought it as a birthday gift for my pup!!
She really loves toys with crinkly material, so when she bites the cabbage leaves and shakes them and they crinkle, she goes crazy lol The round squeaky toy in the middle fits her mouth perfectly and she absolutely loves it!!! It seems a bit big for a 10kg dog, but it's great for hand-play and great for her to play with on her own too

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 부리가 큰아이인데 잘 갖고놀아요 ㅎㅎㅎ 배춧잎 사이사이 간식 넣어주면 찾아먹느라 너무 재밌어해요
reviews.content_en: My pup with the big mouth plays with it well hehe When I put treats between the cabbage leaves, he has so much fun finding and eating them

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 대형견이 갖고 놀기에 크기도 딱 좋습니다. 노즈워크 장난감 고민하시는 분 요 제품으로 강력 추천드립니다!👍 튼튼하고 배송도 빨라서 넘 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The size is perfect for large dogs to play with. If you're wondering about nose work toys, I strongly recommend this product!👍 It's durable and shipping was fast, which is amazing!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
장난감이 많아 살까 말까 고민을 수백번 하다가 구매했어요‼️ 도착하자마자 사료 몇 알을 숨겨서 즤집 갱쥐에게 줬는데 너무 좋아하네요^^! 기존에 있던 삑삑이 공은 1도 신경 안쓰고 양배추만 찾아서 노즈워크에, 공놀이에, 바스락 소리 놀이에 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ여기저기 많이 쓰이네요!!

양배추만으로도 귀엽고 쓸만한데‼️‼️ 중간에 공까지 있으니 더 쓸만하네요 ㅎㅎ 노즈워크를 잘하는지 몰랐는데 쉽게 찾아서 당황쓰,,, 너무 열정적으로 놀이한 나머지 공에서 소리도 안나게 만들어부럿네요🥹🥹🥹

그치만 귀엽고 쓸모있으니 잘 사용할게요
reviews.content_en:
I went back and forth a hundred times deciding whether to buy it with so many toys already, but I finally bought it‼️ As soon as it arrived, I hid a few kibbles and gave it to my little hamster and he loves it^^! He completely ignores the existing squeaky ball and only looks for the cabbage, using it for nose work, ball play, and crinkle sound play hehe!

The cabbage alone is cute and useful‼️‼️ But with the ball in the middle too, it's even more useful hehe I didn't know he was good at nose work but he found it so easily I was surprised... He played with it so enthusiastically that he even broke the squeaker in the ball🥹🥹🥹

But since it's cute and useful, I'll keep using it well

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 바스락바스락 소리나는 잎들도 진짜 많고 중간에는 삑삑이공이 있어서 더 좋아하는것 같아요!!ㅋㅋㅋ💚💚💚 무엇보다 간식 숨길곳이 많아서 여러모로 진짜 최곱니당!🤣🤣 다만 잎사귀가 쪼끔 쉽게 열리는 편이라 약간 아쉽지만 손으로 꽉꽉 모아주면 조금 더 오래 가지고 놀수있는 것 같아요!💚💚💚 진짜 귀엽고 무엇보다 저희 아이가 완전 좋아해서 기분이 좋네용💚💚💚
reviews.content_en: There are so many leaves that make crinkly sounds and there's a squeaky ball in the middle so he seems to like it even more!!ㅋㅋㅋ💚💚💚 Best of all, there are so many places to hide treats, so it's really the best in every way!🤣🤣 The only downside is that the leaves open pretty easily, so it's a little disappointing, but if you squeeze them together tightly with your hands, it seems like he can play with it a bit longer!💚💚💚 It's really cute and most importantly, my pup loves it so much that I'm in a great mood!💚💚💚

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
고민하다가 고른 장난감인데, 아주 잘 골랐어요 ㅋㅋ
사이즈도 큼직하니 좋고, 바시락거려서 좋아해요!
노즈워크는 잘 안시키는데 산김에 시켜보니 바로 잘 하더라구요 ㅎㅎ
이 장난감을 사고 새로운 놀이가 생겼는데,
보통 장난감을 던지라고 가져오는 친구인데요
이 장난감은 자꾸 가운데 공을 빼놓고 가져와서 다시 붙여달라고 하네요..?ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
아예 사람 앞에 가지고 가서 공 떼고 붙여달라고하고, 다시 공 떼고 붙여달라고하고.. 새로운 놀이를 만들어 버렸슴미다 후 구찮지만 해줘야죠.. 우리 구여운 강아지들..?
reviews.content_en:
I deliberated and chose this toy, and I made a great choice lol
The size is nice and big, and I love that it crinkles!
I don't usually do nose work games, but I tried it since I bought it and he picked it up right away hehe
After getting this toy, a new game was born,
Usually when I throw a toy, he brings it back to me,
but with this one, he keeps removing the ball in the middle and bringing it to me asking me to put it back on..?lol
He comes right up to me, takes the ball off, asks me to put it back, then takes it off again and asks me to put it back... He's created a whole new game for himself lol It's annoying but I have to do it.. our cute puppies..?

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이렇게 좋아할 수 있나요,,ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
바스락 거리는 비닐소리에 반응하길래 바스락 인형을 사줬더니 뽕을 뽑고있오요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 오자마자 물어뜯고 애기들이라 노즈워크 처음 도전해봤는데 엄청 재밌어하고 좋아해요🥰 
양배추 인형 완전 강추해요 진짜ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 곧 또 구매해야할거같은 늬낌쓰💯
reviews.content_en: Can they really like it this much,,ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ My pups responded to the crinkly sound of plastic, so I got them a crinkly toy and they're totally getting their fix ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ They started chewing it right away, and since they're still puppies, I tried nose work for the first time and they're having such a blast and loving it 🥰 I seriously recommend the cabbage toy!! I have a feeling I'll need to buy it again soon 💯

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애벌래 장난감을 먼저 사고 세뚜세뚜로 양배추도 추가로 주문했는데요. 신상 장난감 좋아하는 울집 털복슝이 역시나 양배추 주자마자 신나게 가지고 노네요.
양배추 잎파리 부분 전부 바스락 소리나서 좋아해요.
가운데 부분엔 공 같이 생긴거를 입에 물고 다녀요.
굿굿
reviews.content_en: I first bought the caterpillar toy and then added the cabbage toy to the order. My furry friend who loves new toys is playing with the cabbage right away as expected. I love that the cabbage leaves make crinkly sounds. There's something in the middle that looks like a ball that they carry around in their mouth. Good good

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
언제부턴가 지 물건 주문한거 귀신같이 알아채는데, 양배추
보자마자 신나서 이리저리 물고 다니며 좋아합니다. 
가운데 부분이 분리가 되는데 공처럼 가지고 놀기도 하고 
노즈워크도 하고 정말 쓰임 많은 장난감입니다. 저와 강쥐 모두 대만족이에요
reviews.content_en: At some point, my pup started mysteriously knowing when I ordered their stuff, and as soon as they saw the cabbage, they got excited and carried it around playing with it. The middle part separates so they play with it like a ball and do nose work too - it's really a versatile toy. Both my pup and I are totally satisfied 😊

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 생각보다 노즈워크 기능은 크지않고 걍 장난감으로 가지고 놀아요 바스락장난감 정도네요 :) 아이가 모든 장난감을 다 좋아해서 잘가지고놀아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The nose work function is smaller than I thought and they mostly just play with it as a regular toy. It's more of a crinkly toy :) My pup loves all their toys so they play with this one well too ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
우리 멍뭉이 취향은 조금 까다로워서 장난감 사줘도 하루도 안되어서 팽- 질려하는편이라….양배추 구매할 때 고민좀 했습니다. 안에 삑삑이가 받아보니 좀 크더라구요 사이즈가 ㅋㅋ 테니스공? 다행히 우리 멍뭉이 취향에 맞았는지 잘 가지고 놀아요! 안에 삑삑이 붙여 놓으면 알아서 잘 뽑아서 놀아요! 아쉬운건 가격 대비 실밥 마무리가 조금 안되어있어서 따로 정리했습니다
그래도 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아서 만족해요!
reviews.content_en: My pup has pretty picky taste and usually gets bored with toys in less than a day - so I was hesitant about buying the cabbage. The squeaker inside turned out to be pretty big ㅋㅋ Like a tennis ball? Thankfully it matches my pup's taste and they play with it well! When I put the squeaker inside, they figure out how to pull it out and play with it! The only downside is the stitching isn't very neat for the price, so I fixed it separately. But since my pup plays with it well, I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바스락 거리는 소재고 배춧잎 사이사이 트릿넣어주기 좋아요 의외로 금방 찾아먹네요 노즈워크 초보 아기강쥐들이 갖고놀기 적합합니다
reviews.content_en: It's made of crinkly material and it's great for putting treats between the cabbage leaves. They find and eat them surprisingly fast. It's perfect for beginner puppies who are new to nose work games

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
양배추 잎사이사이에사간식도 넣을수 있는건줄 알았는데. .ㅋ
바스래 소리만나고 가운데 공같은거에만 간식 조금 넣을수 있는거네요. .그래도 아가들이 한번씩 관심갖고 놀아주니 다행입니다. .
간식넣고 노즈워크 할수있는 장난감이면 더 좋았겠습니당. .
reviews.content_en: I thought you could put treats between all the cabbage leaves... but it only makes a crinkly sound and you can only put a little treat in the ball-like thing in the middle. Still, the pups show interest and play with it so that's good. It would've been better if it was a toy where you could hide treats and do nose work throughout...

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
계속 눈여겨 봤었는데 진작 살걸 그랬어요
강아지가 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I've been eyeing this for a while and wish I bought it sooner. My dog loves it so much

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락소리로 관심을 끌고 안의
인형은 삑삑소리도 나서 재미나게
잘 놀구 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound catches their attention and the toy inside makes a squeaky sound too, so they play with it happily and love it

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 양배추 장난감의 구성이 아주 좋은 것 같아요! 바스락거려서 소리도 재미있고 간식도 숨겨놓을 수 있어서 활용도가 좋은것 같아요! 양배추 공도 따로 분리해서 공놀이를 할 수 있는 점도 좋았어요👍 무엇보다 이 깜찍한 사진을 찍을 수 있다는 점에서 별 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️개 드립니다!!
reviews.content_en: The cabbage toy's design seems really well-made! It makes a fun crinkly sound and you can hide treats inside, which gives it great versatility! I also liked that you can separate the cabbage ball and play fetch with it 👍 Most importantly, I'm giving it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ stars just for being able to take such cute photos!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저번에 너무 잘놀았는데 찢어져서 또 주문했아요~~ 너무 귀엽고 노즈워크도 되고 많이 바스락거려서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: My pup had so much fun with it last time, but it got torn up so I ordered another one~~ It's so cute and great for nose work, plus the crinkly sound is amazing!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리 아주 잘나서 간식이나 사료 숨겨주면 넘 좋아하네요 오래 가지고 놀아서 만족합니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound is really satisfying, so whenever I hide treats or kibble in there, he absolutely loves it! He plays with it for a long time so I'm really happy with it hehe

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 잘 못하는 애인줄 알았는데
유기견이라 처음에는 잘 못한거였나 봅니다…
지금은 양배추 코 박고 노즈워크  잘하네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 😂
reviews.content_en: I thought my dog just wasn't good at nose work, but since she's a rescue dog, I think she just didn't know how at first... Now she's burying her nose in the cabbage and doing nose work really well lololol 😂

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 강아지가 정말 너무 좋아해요! 코를 박고 나올 생각도 안하네요ㅎㅎㅎ 안에 공이 들어있는건 어떻게 알았는지 귀신 같이 빼서 놀더라구요! 너무너무 잘 산 것 같습니다
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it! He doesn't even want to put his nose down once he starts hehe The ball inside is hidden so well, but he sniffs it out like a ghost and plays with it! I think it was such a great purchase

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 빠스락 소리를 너무 좋아해요 잎 사이에 간식도 많이 숨길수 있어욤
reviews.content_en: She loves the crinkly sound so much! You can hide lots of treats between the leaves too~

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 진짜 넘 귀여워요🥬 숨기기도 쉬워요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute 🥬 Super easy to hide treats in it hehe

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content:
양배추가 너무 알차네요.
보고있으면 웃음이 나요.
간식 넣어줬더니 좋아합니다.
바스락 소리도 유쾌하구요. 넘나 귀엽습니다.
한 통 더 사놓고싶을 지경.^^
reviews.content_en: The cabbage is really well-made. It makes me smile just looking at it. My dog loves it even more when I put treats inside. The crinkly sound is delightful too. It's so cute I want to buy another one. ^^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 내일 배송으로 빠르게 받아 만족스럽습니다. 허접 하지 않고 너무 귀여운 디자인예요. 세탁해서 바로 사용 해 보려구요. 감사합니다.
reviews.content_en: Got it delivered tomorrow and I'm really satisfied! The design isn't cheap-looking at all, it's super cute. I'm going to wash it and use it right away. Thank you!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
양배추 가운데 삑삑이를 좋아하네요 ㅋ
마치 공가지고 놀듯이 저것만 물고 놀아요 ^^
너무 귀엽습니다~~양배추로 노즈워크도 잘하구요~~
reviews.content_en: My dog loves the squeaker in the middle of the cabbage lol He plays with just that part like he's playing with a ball ^^ It's so cute~~ And he's doing great with nose work using the cabbage too~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바잇미 노즈워크 장난감 중에서 이거를 제일 좋아해요!! 너무 난이도가 높으면 포기해버리는데 이거는 킁킁킁하면서 열심히 간식 찾아 먹어요ㅎㅎ 간식을 숨길 수 있는 공간이 많아서 좋고 가운데 알맹이에 히든 포켓이 포인트인거 같아요. 주변 잎사귀에 숨긴 간식 다 빼먹고 알맹이 뜯어서 간식빼먹는데 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: This is my favorite BITE ME nose work toy! If the difficulty is too high, he gives up, but with this one he sniff-sniff-sniffs and works hard to find treats hehe There's lots of space to hide treats which is great, and I think the hidden pocket in the center core is the real highlight. He eats all the treats hidden in the outer leaves and then tears open the core to get the treats inside, and it's just so adorable ㅠㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
킁라킁가 열심히 하면서 너무 좋아해요
양배추 잎 사이사이 간식 숨겨서 주면 집중🤩
어렵지 않아서 어린 강아지한테 딱이에요
저희 강아지는 조금만 어려워도 금방 포기하는데
양배추장난감은 끝까지 간식 찾아먹어서 뿌듯하네용
reviews.content_en: My pup loves this so much and plays with it so enthusiastically! 🤩 When I hide treats between the cabbage leaves, she stays super focused. It's not too difficult, so it's perfect for younger pups. My dog usually gives up quickly if something's even a little challenging, but with this cabbage toy she searches all the way through to find every treat—so satisfying!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 예전부터 갖고싶었는데 품절이라 구매 못하다가 이번에 구매하게 됐어요~ 잘 만든 제품 같은데 쉽긴합니다.
reviews.content_en: I've wanted this for a while but it was out of stock, so I finally got to buy it this time~ It seems like a well-made product, though it is on the easier side.

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
컨셉자체가 귀엽고 숨길곳도 많아서 좋네요
열심히 양배추에 코 넣고 찾는데 정말 귀여워요!!
reviews.content_en: The concept itself is so cute and there are so many places to hide treats! It's really adorable watching her nose around in the cabbage searching for them!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
싱싱한 양배추 바스락 바스락 소리에 
흥분하는 마르티즈 발재간이 손흥민급🤭🤭🤭
속 양배추는 안입에 쏙 물고 다니기 좋은가봐요.
오늘 배송 왔는데 잘 가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: My Maltese gets so excited by the crispy crinkle-crackle sound of fresh cabbage—his little paw movements are world-class! 🤭🤭🤭 He likes carrying the inner cabbage around in his mouth too. It arrived today and he's already having a blast with it.

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
원래 인형 터크 공 이런 장난감은 별로 안좋아하고 노즈워크만
좋아해서 사봤는데 금방 잘가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ 근데 간식만 빼먹구 끝이긴하지만… ㅠㅋㅋ 잘가지고 노네요
간식 열심히 빼먹으려는 모습이 너무 귀엽 💓
크기는 생각보다 작았어요~
reviews.content_en: My pup doesn't usually like stuffed toys, tug toys, or balls—he only likes nose work toys. So I tried this and he picked it up right away! 😄 Though he does just extract all the treats and that's it... 😅 But he plays with it well! The way he eagerly tries to dig out the treats is so cute 💓 The size is smaller than I expected~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
양배추가 바스락 거려서 강쥐가 흥미 엄청 가졌어유
간식도 숨기기 좋고 ㅠ
안에 알맹이도 쓰기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup got SO interested because the cabbage makes that crinkly sound! It's great for hiding treats too, and the inner ball is easy to use as well.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽습니다..장난감도, 그걸 가지고 노는 우리집 강아지도... 쇼핑을 잘한것같아옄ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable... both the toy and watching my puppy play with it... I think I made a great shopping choice! 😄😄

reviews.name: M****
reviews.content:
안에 콩공은 노즈워크 가능 분리가능
바깥 바스락 잎사귀도 노즈워크 가능 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The inner bean toy can be used for nose work and is removable. The outer crinkly leaves also work for nose work! 😄

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 할려고 구매 했는데   너무 쉬어요  그냥 공처럼 가지고 놀고 있어요
reviews.content_en: I bought this for nose work but it's too easy—he just carries it around like a regular ball.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
치즈가 바스락 소리 나는 장난감을 선호하는 편인데 바스락 소리가 완전 잘 나서 그런가 너무너무 좋아해요👍🏻
요거 하나로 노즈워크도 할 수 있고 안에 삑삑이로 공놀이도 가능하고 바스락바스락거리며 흔들고 놀수도 있고 이것이 바로 일석삼조🤭
다 놀도 혼자 헥헥거리는 것두 넘나 귀욥❤️
reviews.content_en: My dog prefers toys that make crinkly sounds, and this one has such a great crinkle that he absolutely loves it! 👍🏻 With this one toy he can do nose work AND play fetch with the squeaker inside AND shake it around making crinkly sounds—talk about killing three birds with one stone! 🤭 And watching him play and get all tired and panting afterward is just the cutest thing ❤️
